top_signals.summary: Mediators spent weeks working on a plan to bridge nearly half a century of hostility between Washington and Tehran

top_signals.title: Cass says freight volume recovery set for second half
top_signals.summary:
Cass data released Monday pointed to the likelihood of a second-half volume recovery as truckload linehaul rates surged again in May.

The post Cass says freight volume recovery set for second half appeared first on FreightWaves.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Routing guides are crumbling: ‘It is different this time’
top_signals.summary:
Some shippers are being forced to reprice their entire book as contractual truckload rates set just a couple of months ago are no longer being honored.

The post Routing guides are crumbling: ‘It is different this time’ appeared first on FreightWaves.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.
